use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH ACTIVE LUPUS NEPHRITIS

indications.text:
LUPKYNIS is indicated in combination with a background immunosuppressive therapy regimen [see
Clinical Studies (14)] for the treatment of adult patients with active lupus nephritis (LN).
Limitations of Use: Safety and efficacy of LUPKYNIS have not been established in combination with
cyclophosphamid...
